title: armeria maritima var. majuscula
intro: Armeria maritima var. majuscula, also known as the sea thrift or sea pink, is a variety of flowering plant in the primrose family that is native to coastal regions in Europe and North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Armeria maritima var. majuscula include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support respiratory health and treat conditions such as bronchitis and asthma.
